## IMessageQueue.destroy() method

Safely destroys current queue, unregistered all set event listeners and connections. Supposed to be an async function.

**Signature:**

```typescript
destroy(): Promise<void>;
```
**Returns:**

Promise&lt;void&gt;

{<!-- -->Promise<void>}
